sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue Trend
sql_queries.sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', T1.OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, SUM(T2.UnitPrice * T2.Quantity * (1 - T2.Discount)) AS MonthlyRevenue FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN "Order Details" AS T2 ON T1.OrderID = T2.OrderID GROUP BY OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth;

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(T1.UnitPrice * T1.Quantity * (1 - T1.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" AS T1;

sql_queries.title: Revenue by Product Category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT T1.CategoryName, SUM(T3.UnitPrice * T3.Quantity * (1 - T3.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Categories AS T1 INNER JOIN Products AS T2 ON T1.CategoryID = T2.CategoryID INNER JOIN "Order Details" AS T3 ON T2.ProductID = T3.ProductID GROUP BY T1.CategoryName ORDER BY Revenue DESC;

sql_queries.title: Revenue by Customer Country
sql_queries.sql: SELECT T1.Country, SUM(T3.UnitPrice * T3.Quantity * (1 - T3.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Orders AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID INNER JOIN "Order Details" AS T3 ON T2.OrderID = T3.OrderID GROUP BY T1.Country ORDER BY Revenue DESC;
